commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P2] Maintainers should review rollout/dry-run behavior and refresh the branch before enabling scheduled execute mode; there is no narrow automated repair remaining.; Cleared: The diff adds a local command and workflow gates around existing GitHub App token usage without adding new third-party execution or broader workflow permissions. (sha=5fb902aa24dde749fe1da7854d78fa7255109d91)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a `bot-proof` lane for ClawSweeper-authored PRs blocked on real behavior proof, with workflow inputs, a package script, CLI logic, status/comment handling, and focused unit coverage.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction; this is a new automation lane. For the prior workflow concern, source inspection now shows the scheduled job starts when either proof-nudge scheduling or bot-proof scheduling is enabled.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainers should review rollout/dry-run behavior and refresh the branch before enabling scheduled execute mode; there is no narrow automated repair remaining.

target.title: Add bot-owned proof handling lane
target.body:
## Summary
- add a separate `bot-proof` lane for ClawSweeper-owned PRs blocked on real behavior proof
- add a maintainer proof decision status label/comment path without changing contributor proof nudges
- keep bot-triggered Mantis requests limited to currently dispatchable Mantis scenarios, with `visual_task`/Control UI suggestions left as maintainer decisions
- wire the lane behind manual/scheduled workflow gates and add coverage for eligibility, skip cases, Mantis suggestions, and comment copy

## Why
Bot-authored replacement PRs like https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/90618 can be blocked on real behavior proof, while contributor proof nudges intentionally skip bot-authored PRs. This gives those PRs an auditable maintainer/proof path without posting contributor-style reminders to automation.

## Validation
- `pnpm run build`
- `node --test test/clawsweeper.test.ts --test-name-pattern "bot proof|proof nudge|ClawSweeper PR status label scheme"`
- `pnpm run bot-proof -- --target-repo openclaw/openclaw --items-dir .artifacts/bot-proof-dry-run/items --item-number 90618 --limit 1 --processed-limit 1 --report-path .artifacts/bot-proof-dry-run/report-mantis-scope.json` planned `bot_proof_decision_planned` for head `ae868b7b18dfbd5e6a2422c8005501b57c52e15a`
- `pnpm run check`
target.author: romneyda

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
